title: 2026 Oscar Best Picture Prediction Analysis
text: Pete Hammond predicts One Battle After Another will win Best Picture at the 98th Academy Awards. The film has dominated precursor awards with an unprecedented sweep until recent momentum shifts. Two Warner Bros. films dominate the race: One Battle After Another led the field through most awards season with a run of the precursor awards like rarely seen before. Sinners recently surged by winning the SAG Cast Award, setting off speculation about a potential upset. Hammond draws comparison to 1952, when two heavy favorites competed while a surprise winner emerged. He notes the Academy's preferential ballot system can produce unexpected results, citing Moonlight as an example. The prediction comes amid uncertainty about voter participation due to new Academy rules requiring members to attest they've watched all nominees before voting. Some Academy members reportedly opted not to vote rather than risk dishonesty about viewing requirements. Despite Sinners gaining momentum and breaking the nomination record with 16 nods versus One Battle's 13, Hammond maintains his Best Picture prediction favors Anderson's film based on sustained support throughout the season.
